name: button
description: A token-styled button (or link styled as a button); the click is wired by the consuming wire template via l:click, the partial renders only the styled control. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the button partial to your JTE root at lievit/button.jte, reached as @template.lievit.button(variant=..., content=@`...`). Wire the action with l:click on the rendered element from the consuming wire template, or pass href to render a real link. The source is yours: edit freely.
